name: prose-minion
description: AI prose analysis and writing assistant for fiction authors. Dialogue suggestions, context-aware dictionary, comprehensive prose metrics, style flags, word frequency, and manuscript search. Metrics/search work offline—no API key needed.

proseMinion.assistantModel.description: AI model for assistant tools (Prose/Dialogue analysis). See Settings Overlay for curated list, or enter any OpenRouter model ID.

proseMinion.dictionaryModel.description: AI model for dictionary and utility tools. See Settings Overlay for curated list, or enter any OpenRouter model ID.

proseMinion.contextModel.description: AI model for context bot features. See Settings Overlay for curated list, or enter any OpenRouter model ID.

proseMinion.categoryModel.description: AI model for Category Search (curated list)

proseMinion.includeCraftGuides.description: Include craft guides in AI prompts (provides additional writing guidance but uses more tokens)

proseMinion.ui.showTokenWidget.description: Show the session token usage widget in the header (tokens and optional cost).

enumDescriptions: Follow your active VS Code color theme (default).
Prose Minion's pinned warm-dark brand palette.
proseMinion.ui.sidebarTheme.description: Sidebar palette: follow your active VS Code color theme (the default), or pin Prose Minion's warm-dark brand look. Also toggleable from the header.

proseMinion.temperature.description: AI creativity level (0 = focused, 2 = very creative)

proseMinion.contextPaths.characters.description: Comma-separated glob patterns for character reference files (only .md and .txt files are used).

proseMinion.contextPaths.locations.description: Comma-separated glob patterns for setting/location files (only .md and .txt files are used).

proseMinion.contextPaths.themes.description: Comma-separated glob patterns for theme notebooks (only .md and .txt files are used).

proseMinion.contextPaths.things.description: Comma-separated glob patterns for important objects or props (only .md and .txt files are used).

proseMinion.contextPaths.chapters.description: Comma-separated glob patterns for draft chapters and outlines (only .md and .txt files are used).

proseMinion.contextPaths.manuscript.description: Comma-separated glob patterns for polished manuscript chapters (only .md and .txt files are used).

proseMinion.contextPaths.projectBrief.description: Comma-separated glob patterns for project brief materials (only .md and .txt files are used).

proseMinion.contextPaths.general.description: Comma-separated glob patterns for general reference material (only .md and .txt files are used).

proseMinion.publishingStandards.preset.description: Publishing standards preset for Metrics comparison: 'none', 'manuscript', or 'genre:<abbreviation|name|slug>'.

proseMinion.publishingStandards.pageSize.description: Selected trim size key for the chosen genre (uses page_sizes[].format when available, otherwise WIDTHxHEIGHT).

proseMinion.wordFrequency.topN.description: Top N words to include in the Word Frequency report.

proseMinion.wordFrequency.includeHapaxLi.description: Include the Hapax (frequency=1) word list at the bottom of the Word Frequency report.

proseMinion.wordFrequency.hapaxDisplayMa.description: Maximum Hapax words to display inline in the report (full list still counted).

proseMinion.wordFrequency.includeStopwor.description: Include a Top Stopwords table with counts and percentages.

proseMinion.wordFrequency.contentWordsOn.description: Show Top Words using content words only (excludes stopwords).

proseMinion.wordFrequency.posEnabled.description: Enable POS sections using wink-pos-tagger. If the tagger cannot initialize, sections are marked unavailable.

proseMinion.wordFrequency.enableLemmas.description: Enable a lemmatized Top Words view (experimental).

proseMinion.wordFrequency.lengthHistogra.description: Maximum token length to show in the Word Length Distribution histogram.

proseMinion.wordFrequency.minCharacterLe.markdownDescription: Minimum character length for words in Word Frequency results. Filter helps identify longer, more distinctive word patterns by excluding short common words. **1+** = all words, **3+** = excludes 'it', 'is', 'an', **5+** = multi-syllable words, **6+** = distinctive vocabulary, **7+** = complex words, **8+** = advanced vocabulary, **9+** = rare/specialized words. Applied to Top Words, POS, Bigrams/Trigrams, Hapax List, and Lemmas. Does NOT filter Stop Words or Length Histogram.

proseMinion.wordSearch.contextWords.description: Number of words to show around each word search match for context

proseMinion.wordSearch.clusterWindow.description: Maximum word distance to group matches into a cluster

proseMinion.wordSearch.minClusterSize.description: Minimum number of matches required to form a cluster

proseMinion.wordSearch.enableAssistantEx.description: Enable assistant-based expansion for target words (synonyms, inflections).

proseMinion.applyContextWindowTrimming.markdownDescription: Apply context window trimming to prevent token limit errors. **Limits**: UI recommends 500-word excerpts; Context Agent (50K words), Analysis Agents (75K words total: excerpt + context + guides). Targets 128K token context window. Disable if using models with larger context windows (e.g., 200K+).

proseMinion.categorySearch.ngramMode.description: Default search mode for new searches. Words = individual words, Bigrams = 2-word phrases, Trigrams = 3-word phrases. Changes take effect on panel reload.

proseMinion.categorySearch.minPhraseOccu.description: Default minimum phrase occurrences for bigram/trigram searches. Phrases appearing fewer times are filtered out. Changes take effect on panel reload.

scripts.build: npm run clean:dist && npm run copy:resources && webpack --mode production && npm run verify:bundle
